title: Pet Sitter Instructions
text:
## Pet Sitter Instructions

Thank you for watching **Matilda** (dark red golden retriever), **Violet** (tortie cat), and **Zebby** (black cat).

**Matilda:** Needs {adjective} walks and one {adjective} treat after she {past-tense verb} politely.

**Violet:** Demands {adjective} food at exactly {number} o'clock and will {verb} if ignored.

**Zebby:** Hides in the {place} and attacks anything {adjective}.

**Rules:** Do not {verb} the vacuum near them. Emergency vet number is on the {object}.

**Bonus:** If all three sit together peacefully, photograph it — it is {adjective} and probably a sign.
